title: Deploy companion on a header-capable free host
goal: Provide a repository-controlled free HTTPS deployment for the existing deterministic companion bundle that passes the complete security-header doctor and remains loadable inside authenticated Miro.

approval.note: Use only free hosting already authorized by the user. Preserve deterministic build digests, least privilege and real Miro readback. Do not enable paid plans or alter account recovery/MFA.

acceptance.assertion: The deployment is free, durable, repository-controlled and HTTPS-enforced.
Every deployed release file matches the deterministic build manifest exactly.
Real responses satisfy the complete release-doctor header contract without relying on repository-only _headers files.
Launcher and panel load inside authenticated Miro and read-only Web SDK calls still succeed.
GitHub Pages remains a documented fallback until the hardened host is independently proven.

metadata.block_reason: The verified header-capable backend is running only on Heimberry loopback. Public HTTPS exposure requires one interactive owner authorization at Cloudflare or Tailscale; no safe noninteractive authorization path is available.

implementation_evidence.validation: 720 tests passed; 229 Miro tests included; 6 focused host tests; Ruff passed; six GitHub checks passed.

heimberry.readback: GET/HEAD, exact body digest, CSP/frame-ancestors, Permissions-Policy, Referrer-Policy, nosniff and HSTS passed; writes return 405.

satisfied_acceptance.byte-identity: The internal Heimberry deployment serves the exact deterministic build digest 7ffbe6210037e17886471f648e2fefaf853815cf4c2de18fef2e43b7ff8313db from a digest-bound release after atomic receipt and file verification.
satisfied_acceptance.no-regression: The existing repository-owned GitHub Pages fallback remains unchanged, public and functional while the hardened public cutover is blocked.

open_acceptance.durable-free-host: Not satisfied: the header-capable service is currently loopback-only and has no public HTTPS URL.
open_acceptance.security-headers: Backend responses satisfy the header contract, but no public release-doctor PASS exists yet.
open_acceptance.miro-compatibility: The existing Pages URL remains proven in Miro; the new hardened URL cannot be tested until public exposure is authorized.
